title: 'Will only proceed with US support': UK pulls out of Chagos deal after Trump's criticism
summary_full: Britain's proposed Chagos Islands deal with Mauritius has stalled due to US approval uncertainties, particularly Donald Trump's opposition. The agreement, which would transfer sovereignty while leasing Diego Garcia, faces legislative hurdles before Parliament dissolves. Officials emphasize the deal's dependence on US backing for the strategic base's security, leaving its future uncertain amid ongoing negotiations.
